era: Seattle, Washington. Self-released. Dream-haze folk rebuilt with electronic instruments. Re-examined here in electronic context -- the dream circuit as primary compositional language.

location.formative: Seattle's indie folk and electronic scenes. The transition from acoustic dream haze to electronic pulse. Self-released -- independent of label infrastructure.
location.career: Lemolo -- Indie Folk to Electronic Pop. The Kaleidoscope (2013, self-released). Electronic-context reframing at degree 104. SEVENTH return artist.

members.name: Meagan Grandall
members.note: Co-founder. First appeared at degree 56 (Indie Folk, E=2). Returns at degree 104 in electronic context (E=3).

members.name: Kendra Cox
members.note: Co-founder. The rhythmic shift from acoustic drums to electronic percussion is central to the electronic reframing.

associated_musicians.name: Lemolo (original)
associated_musicians.note: Indie Folk framing. Dream haze. E=2. The borrowed landscape.

associated_musicians.name: Briana Marela electronic
associated_musicians.note: Art Pop/Electronic. Voice dissolved into texture. Lemolo keeps voice atop electronic foundation. Two return strategies at consecutive degrees.

associated_musicians.name: NAVVI
associated_musicians.note: Fully electronic from the start. Lemolo arrives at electronic from folk origins. Different trajectories to similar territory.

associated_musicians.name: Briana Marela
associated_musicians.note: Both Briana Marela (72) and Lemolo (56) return in electronic context (103, 104). Parallel return trajectories.

associated_musicians.name: The Postal Service
associated_musicians.note: Glitch-based Electronic Pop. Lemolo's Electronic Pop is dream-based. Same genre, different aesthetic ancestry.

theory_nodes.concept: The dream circuit (one hundred fifth acoustic element -- the quality produced when a dream-haze folk aesthetic is rebuilt with electronic instruments; the atmospheric quality of reverb-drenched guitar and layered vocals replicated through synthesizers and drum machines; the dream persists but now it pulses; analog haze becomes digital pulse)
examples: Lemolo electronic (degree 104) -- dream haze rebuilt with electronic instruments. The atmospheric quality persists but the foundation is now synthetic.
Contrast with the layered dissolution (degree 103, Briana Marela electronic) -- voice dissolves into texture. The dream circuit keeps voice afloat on electronic surface.
Contrast with the dream haze (degree 56, Lemolo original) -- acoustic foundation, no pulse. The dream circuit adds the pulse.
Contrast with the melodic ache (degree 86, Postal Service) -- glitch-based. The dream circuit is haze-based.
theory_nodes.description: The dream circuit is the 105th acoustic element. Dream-haze folk rebuilt with electronic instruments. The dream persists but now it pulses. Analog haze becomes digital pulse.

ancestors: The dream haze (degree 56, Lemolo original) -- acoustic foundation. The dream circuit is electronic foundation.
The layered dissolution (degree 103, Briana Marela electronic) -- voice dissolved into texture. The dream circuit keeps voice afloat.
genealogy.relationship: One hundred five acoustic elements across one hundred four degrees. Track element 106 at degree 105.

theory_nodes.concept: The sustained electronic return (one hundred fifth artist-city pattern -- the pattern where multiple artists return in electronic context across consecutive degrees; back-to-back electronic returns at 103-104 establish the electronic reframing as sustained engine mechanism; systematic, not one-off)
examples: Lemolo electronic (degree 104) + Briana Marela electronic (degree 103) -- back-to-back electronic returns.
Extends the electronic reframing (degree 103) and re-contextualized return (degree 97). Three electronic returns in eight degrees (97, 103, 104).
Seventh return artist. The return pattern is now a sustained engine mechanism.
theory_nodes.description: The sustained electronic return is the 105th artist-city pattern. Back-to-back electronic returns at 103-104 establish electronic reframing as sustained engine pattern.

ancestors: The electronic reframing (degree 103, Briana Marela electronic) -- first electronic-context return at consecutive degree.
The re-contextualized return (degree 97, Postal Service electronic) -- the founding instance of analytical reframing.
genealogy.relationship: One hundred five artist-city patterns across one hundred four degrees. Track pattern 106 at degree 105.

theory_nodes.concept: Electronic Pop at Genre Stage 86 -- dream-based Electronic Pop; distinguished from glitch-based Postal Service (86) and voice-dissolved Briana Marela (103); same genre family, different aesthetic ancestry; the electronic foundation replaces acoustic folk foundation
examples: Lemolo electronic (degree 104) -- Electronic Pop at Genre Stage 86.
Distinguished from Electronic Pop (degree 86, Postal Service). Postal Service is glitch-based. Lemolo is dream-based.
Distinguished from Art Pop/Electronic (degree 103, Briana Marela electronic). Different voice-to-electronic relationship.
theory_nodes.description: Electronic Pop at Genre Stage 86. Dream-based Electronic Pop. Same genre as Postal Service (86) but different aesthetic ancestry.

ancestors: Indie Folk (degree 56, Lemolo original). Genre shifts with electronic reframing.
Electronic Pop (degree 86, Postal Service). Same genre, different foundation.
genealogy.relationship: Genre Stage 86 at degree 104. Track at 105.

theory_nodes.concept: E=3 at degree 104 -- energy rises from E=2 (degree 56) to E=3; electronic production density increases the energy footprint; second consecutive energy rise via electronic reframing (Briana Marela 72->103: E=2->E=3; Lemolo 56->104: E=2->E=3)
examples: Lemolo electronic (degree 104) -- E=3. Up from E=2 at degree 56.
Briana Marela electronic (degree 103) -- E=3. Up from E=2 at degree 72.
Two consecutive returns, both E=2 -> E=3. The electronic reframing consistently raises energy by one level.
theory_nodes.description: E=3 at degree 104. Energy rises from E=2 at degree 56. Second consecutive electronic-reframing energy rise.

ancestors: E=2 at degree 56 (Lemolo original). Energy rises with electronic reframing.
E=3 at degree 103 (Briana Marela electronic). Same energy rise pattern.

cross_references.relationship: SAME ARTIST, DIFFERENT LENS! Degree 56 framed as Indie Folk -- dream haze, acoustic foundation, E=2. Degree 104 reframes as Electronic Pop -- electronic foundation, dream pulse, E=3. Seventh return artist.

BACK-TO-BACK ELECTRONIC RETURNS! Both return in electronic context at consecutive degrees. Briana Marela dissolves voice into texture. Lemolo keeps voice atop electronic foundation. Two return strategies.
ELECTRONIC SPECTRUM. NAVVI's Dream Pop/Electronic is fully electronic from the start. Lemolo arrives at electronic from folk origins. Different trajectories.
PARALLEL RETURN TRAJECTORIES. Both Briana Marela (72->103) and Lemolo (56->104) return in electronic context. Both E=2 to E=3. Parallel transformations.
SAME GENRE, DIFFERENT ANCESTRY. Both Electronic Pop. Postal Service is glitch-based, laptop-assembled. Lemolo is dream-based, duo-driven. Same genre, different aesthetic foundation.
